title: Misti Day
compiled_truth: Misti Day is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-30 to 2002-02-13), Misti Day sent 7 and received 84 emails, totalling 91 interactions. Top correspondents: [Faith Killen](people/faith-killen) (6), [Sarah Brown](people/sarah-brown) (5), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (4), [Tammie Schoppe](people/tammie-schoppe) (4), [Ben Jacoby](people/ben-jacoby) (3). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, inbox.
